ddls:
CREATE TABLE "citations" (
  "citation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each citation */,
  "citation_issued_datetime" TEXT /* Date and time the citation was issued */,
  "violation_description" TEXT /* Description of the violation */,
  "vehicle_plate_state" TEXT /* State where the vehicle is registered */,
  "vehicle_plate" TEXT /* Vehicle plate number */,
  "fine_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the fine in dollars */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the citation was added to the system */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the neighborhood where the citation was issued */,
  "citation_year" INTEGER /* Year the citation was issued */,
  "citation_month" TEXT /* Month the citation was issued */,
  "citation_month_and_year" TEXT /* Month and year the citation was issued */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the citation record was last updated */,
  "officer_comments" TEXT /* Comments from the officer who issued the citation */,
  "evidence_photos" TEXT /* Photos of evidence related to the citation */,
  "video_footage" TEXT /* Video footage related to the citation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("citation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citations_violation_description FOREIGN KEY ("violation_description") REFERENCES violation_types ("violation_type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citations_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighborhoods" (
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood */,
  "neighborhood_name" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city where the neighborhood is located */,
  "geographic_area" TEXT /* Geographic area of the neighborhood */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the neighborhood */,
  "median_income" TEXT /* Median income of the neighborhood */,
  "crime_rate" TEXT /* Crime rate of the neighborhood */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the city is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the city is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "mayor_name" TEXT /* Name of the mayor of the city */,
  "city_website" TEXT /* Website of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "vehicle_plate" TEXT /* Vehicle plate number */,
  "vehicle_plate_state" TEXT /* State where the vehicle is registered */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the vehicle */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the owner of the vehicle */,
  "registration_status" TEXT /* Status of the vehicle registration (e.g., active, expired) */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle (e.g., car, truck, motorcycle) */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each owner */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the owner */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the owner */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the owner */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the owner */,
  "driver_license_number" TEXT /* Driver's license number of the owner */,
  "driver_license_state" TEXT /* State where the driver's license was issued */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "violation_types" (
  "violation_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each violation type */,
  "violation_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the violation type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the violation type */,
  "fine_amount" TEXT /* Fine amount associated with the violation type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("violation_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fines" (
  "fine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fine */,
  "citation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the citation the fine is associated with */,
  "fine_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the fine in dollars */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status of the fine (e.g., paid, unpaid) */,
  "date_paid" TEXT /* Date the fine was paid */,
  "late_fee" TEXT /* Late fee associated with the fine */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fines_citation_id FOREIGN KEY ("citation_id") REFERENCES citations ("citation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "fine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fine the payment is for */,
  "payment_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the payment in dollars */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, check) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Transaction ID for the payment */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_fine_id FOREIGN KEY ("fine_id") REFERENCES fines ("fine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "officers" (
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each officer */,
  "officer_name" TEXT /* Name of the officer */,
  "badge_number" TEXT /* Badge number of the officer */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the officer belongs to */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the officer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the officer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("officer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "citation_officers" (
  "citation_officer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each citation-officer relationship */,
  "citation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the citation */,
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the officer who issued the citation */,
  "officer_role" TEXT /* Role of the officer (e.g., issuer, reviewer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("citation_officer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citation_officers_officer_id FOREIGN KEY ("officer_id") REFERENCES officers ("officer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citation_officers_citation_id FOREIGN KEY ("citation_id") REFERENCES citations ("citation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., officer, admin, data analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., violation trends, payment statistics) */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who generated the report */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "enforcement_areas" (
  "enforcement_area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enforcement area */,
  "enforcement_area_name" TEXT /* Name of the enforcement area */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the neighborhood where the enforcement area is located */,
  "geographic_area" TEXT /* Geographic area of the enforcement area */,
  "enforcement_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of enforcement in the area (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "enforcement_hours" TEXT /* Hours of enforcement in the area (e.g., 8am-5pm) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enforcement_area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enforcement_areas_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enforcement_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enforcement log entry */,
  "enforcement_area_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enforcement area */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the enforcement activity */,
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the officer who conducted the enforcement */,
  "number_of_citations_issued" INTEGER /* Number of citations issued during the enforcement activity */,
  "enforcement_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the officer about the enforcement activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enforcement_logs_enforcement_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("enforcement_area_id") REFERENCES enforcement_areas ("enforcement_area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enforcement_logs_officer_id FOREIGN KEY ("officer_id") REFERENCES officers ("officer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "camera_feeds" (
  "camera_feed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each camera feed */,
  "camera_name" TEXT /* Name of the camera */,
  "camera_location" TEXT /* Location of the camera */,
  "camera_type" TEXT /* Type of camera (e.g., traffic camera, security camera) */,
  "streaming_url" TEXT /* URL for the camera's streaming feed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("camera_feed_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "camera_enforcement_areas" (
  "camera_enforcement_area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each camera-enforcement area relationship */,
  "camera_feed_id" INTEGER /* ID of the camera feed */,
  "enforcement_area_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enforcement area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("camera_enforcement_area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_camera_enforcement_areas_camera_feed_id FOREIGN KEY ("camera_feed_id") REFERENCES camera_feeds ("camera_feed_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_camera_enforcement_areas_enforcement_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("enforcement_area_id") REFERENCES enforcement_areas ("enforcement_area_id")
)
